allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; prs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"#{p['number']} {p['title']} [{p['state']}]\\"\) for p in prs]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; reviews=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"state={r['state']} user={r['user']['login']} submitted={r['submitted_at']} body={r['body'][:100]}\\"\) for r in reviews]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; pr=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"title={pr['title']}\\nstate={pr['state']}\\ndraft={pr['draft']}\\nmerged={pr.get\('merged',False\)}\\nlabels={[l['name'] for l in pr['labels']]}\\nbase={pr['base']['ref']}\\nhead={pr['head']['ref']}\\ncreated={pr['created_at']}\\nupdated={pr['updated_at']}\\n\\"\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; statuses=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"state={s['state']} context={s['context']} desc={s['description']}\\"\) for s in statuses[:10]] if isinstance\(statuses,list\) else print\(statuses\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"name={r['name']} status={r['status']} conclusion={r['conclusion']}\\"\) for r in d.get\('check_runs',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in d.get\('check_runs',[]\): print\(f\\"=== {r['name']} ===\\"\) print\(f\\"status={r['status']} conclusion={r['conclusion']}\\"\) print\(f\\"output: {r['output']['title']} - {r['output']['summary']}\\"\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in d.get\('workflow_runs',[]\): print\(f\\"id={r['id']} name={r['name']} status={r['status']} conclusion={r['conclusion']} event={r['event']} created={r['created_at']}\\"\) ")
